channel.title: 链聘 ChainHire · 最新 Web3 岗位
channel.description: Web3 / crypto 行业全职能最新公开招聘，每日自动更新。

item.title: Product Designer · Binance
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Conduct user research and deliver detailed UI/UX design solutions for Binance's blockchain ecosystem products.

item.title: Product Designer Lead - UI/UX · Binance
item.description: 交易所 · 负责人/总监 · Remote · 面议。Lead UI/UX design across Binance's full product suite covering trading, finance, and Web3 features.

item.title: Product Designer · Blum
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。3+ years product design experience in web3/crypto, strong proficiency in Figma or Sketch, for Blum's Telegram-native hybrid exchange (90M+ users).

item.title: Product Designer Intern · CoinGecko
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Strong passion for blockchain/cryptocurrency industry; support product design across CoinGecko's data and analytics platform.

item.title: Product Designer · Chainlink Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Build intuitive user-driven experiences leveraging user testing, UX/UI and product design best practices for Chainlink's oracle network products.

item.title: Product Designer - Innovation Lab · Crypto.com
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Design next-generation crypto product concepts in Crypto.com's Innovation Lab; concept prototyping and user research.

item.title: Staff Product Designer (Trading) · Phantom
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。6+ years shipping applications to users; design-led vision for Phantom's crypto wallet trading experience on Solana and EVM chains.

item.title: Product Designer · Binance.US
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote (US) · 面议。Passionate designer to shape the user experience of Binance.US core crypto trading products; collaborate with product and engineering.

item.title: Senior Product Designer · Trilitech
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · London, UK · 面议。Drive innovation in Web3 by empowering developers on the Tezos blockchain; 5+ years product design experience in tech or fintech.

item.title: Site Reliability Engineer · Binance
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Design, build, and improve internal monitoring/alerting tools; collaborate with Dev, QA, and DevOps teams at Binance.

item.title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer (Node.js & Javascript), Trading Technologies · Binance
item.description: 交易所 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Senior SRE with solid Node.js experience to maintain and improve Binance's trading systems internal testing and validation infrastructure.

item.title: Site Reliability Engineer · SwissBorg
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。SRE role valuing trust, ownership, and responsibility at SwissBorg's crypto wealth management platform (880K+ users, $1.9B AUM).

item.title: Web3 Product Manager · Gate.io
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Web3 product management for Gate.io, one of the world's top 10 digital asset exchanges; enable crypto projects to launch and trade securely.

item.title: Senior Product Manager, KYC · Binance
item.description: 交易所 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。5-8 years PM experience in tech/fintech/finance/blockchain; lead KYC product strategy and execution at Binance.

item.title: Senior Product Manager - Wallet · Blockdaemon
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。3+ years Web3/crypto experience; lead wallet product strategy and roadmap at Blockdaemon's blockchain infrastructure platform.

item.title: Lead Product Manager, web3 · Improbable
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 负责人/总监 · Remote · 面议。Define, build, and scale products across InfoFi and DeFi ecosystems at Improbable's Web3 division.

item.title: Product Manager - Developer Experience · Trilitech
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · London, UK · 面议。Spearhead core blockchain development and developer experience on the Tezos network; technical PM with blockchain background preferred.

item.title: Product Manager - Web3 Wallets · Trilitech
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · London, UK · 面议。Lead development of Umami reference wallet and account abstraction technologies on Tezos; solid understanding of blockchain dApps.

item.title: Product Manager - DEX · Trilitech
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · London, UK · 面议。Technical PM to lead development of a decentralised exchange for spot and derivatives trading incubated at Trilitech (Tezos R&D).

item.title: Crypto Project Manager · SwissBorg
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Coordinate with compliance, legal, investment, and engineering teams to ensure regulatory requirements are met for crypto product rollouts at SwissBorg.

item.title: Staff Security Engineer, Smart Contracts · Eigen Labs
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 资深/Staff · Remote (US) · 面议。Staff-level smart contract security engineering for EigenLayer protocol; lead security reviews and threat modeling.

item.title: Chief Information Security Officer · SwissBorg
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 负责人/总监 · Remote · 面议。Lead SwissBorg's security program; strong background in information security leadership, regulatory compliance, and cryptocurrency custody security.

item.title: Account Manager (BD) · Trust Wallet
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 中级 · Remote · 面议。BD and account management for Trust Wallet, the leading non-custodial cryptocurrency wallet with 200M+ users worldwide.

item.title: Partnerships / Business Development Manager · Crypto Banter
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Drive business growth through partnerships and brand activations for Crypto Banter, a leading crypto media and education platform.

item.title: Marketing & Growth Manager (DeFi/RWA project) · Animoca Brands
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote / Hong Kong · 面议。3-5 years marketing and community management in Web3/tech; lead marketing and growth for Animoca Brands' DeFi/RWA project.

item.title: Senior Data Scientist (Blocktracer/Algo) · Binance
item.description: 交易所 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。MS/PhD with 5+ years algorithm/ML/data science; real-world blockchain analytics at global scale at Binance.

item.title: Crypto Data Scientist / Machine Learning - LLM Engineer (Global - Remote) · Token Metrics
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 中级 · Remote (Global) · 面议。Evaluate ML processes, perform statistical analysis, and enhance AI/LLM accuracy for Token Metrics crypto intelligence platform.

item.title: Blockchain Data Scientist Intern · Ledger
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote / Europe · 面议。Blockchain data science internship at Ledger, the world's leading hardware wallet manufacturer.

item.title: Growth Marketing Manager · Crypto Banter
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。4+ years growth/performance marketing for consumer education, subscription, or community-based products; lead Crypto Banter's growth.

item.title: Marketing Manager · Binance
item.description: 交易所 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Lead local market initiatives, drive community engagement, and promote Binance's brand in the crypto space.

item.title: Senior Growth Manager (SEO & ASO) · Trust Wallet
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。SEO/ASO, website management, and cross-functional product growth at Trust Wallet (200M+ users).

item.title: Senior Counsel, Legal & Compliance · OpenSea
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 资深/Staff · Remote (US) · 面议。Lead illicit finance and sanctions compliance program; own privacy and data regulatory functions at OpenSea.

item.title: Product and Regulatory Counsel · MoonPay
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Regulatory advice on Web3 product development; strong preference for crypto experience and developing legal jurisprudence around Web3.

item.title: Junior Legal Counsel Regulatory (Crypto) · SwissBorg
item.description: 合规/托管/其他 · 中级 · Remote / Europe · 面议。Provide regulatory advice on cryptoasset services and blockchain technology; junior legal counsel at SwissBorg's crypto wealth platform.

item.title: Global Regulatory Legal Lead · Binance
item.description: 交易所 · 负责人/总监 · Remote · 面议。15+ years regulatory legal experience; manage complex regulatory compliance issues across multiple jurisdictions for Binance.

item.title: Recruiter (Contract) · Allium
item.description: 节点/RPC基础设施 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Contract recruiter to scale Allium's team at the blockchain data platform; full-cycle recruiting for technical and non-technical roles.

item.title: Sequencing Protocol Engineer, Rust · OP Labs (Optimism)
item.description: 公链/L2 · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Develop sequencing and MEV-focused components of the OP Stack; deep Rust expertise for Optimism's L2 protocol.

item.title: Senior/Staff DeFi Engineer · Ethena Labs
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Proficiency in Solidity/EVM and Rust/Solana; build advanced DeFi protocol tooling and infrastructure at Ethena Labs.

item.title: Solidity Protocol Engineer · Wormhole Foundation
item.description: 公链/L2 · 中级 · Remote · 面议。Contribute to open source smart contracts and protocols on EVM chains for Wormhole's cross-chain messaging infrastructure.

item.title: Senior Blockchain Engineer - Rust/Solana · MetaWealth
item.description: 钱包/DeFi · 资深/Staff · Remote · 面议。Develop Solana Programs using Anchor framework for MetaWealth's tokenized real estate platform; Rust and Solana expertise required.
